name: Wine of Spice and Surprise
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour the wine, honey, ground pepper, saffron, pounded mastic (if using), and bay leaves into a large jar with a tight-fitting lid. Stir well.
2. Mash the dates with your fingers, and add to the wine mixture. Seal and refrigerate for 1 day.
3. Pour the punch into a punch bowl, and serve in individual glasses, cups, or goblets.
